name: Wireless Ergonomic Mouse
description: Comfort-first wireless mouse with silent clicks and adjustable DPI.

name: Mechanical Keyboard 75%
description: Hot-swappable 75% keyboard with RGB backlight and tactile switches.

name: 4K UltraWide Monitor
description: 34-inch ultrawide monitor designed for multitasking and immersive visuals.

name: USB-C Docking Station
description: Multi-port docking station with HDMI, Ethernet, and dual USB-C passthrough.

description: Over-ear headphones with adaptive noise cancelation and long battery life.

name: Portable SSD 1TB
description: Compact high-speed external SSD for backups and on-the-go projects.

name: 1080p Streaming Webcam
description: Autofocus webcam with dual microphones and low-light correction.

description: Stable and foldable aluminum stand for improved posture and airflow.

description: App-controlled desk lamp with adjustable temperature and brightness presets.

description: Pocket-sized Bluetooth speaker with punchy sound and IPX5 splash resistance.
